About

About Me

Borcsa Vass is a cinematic storyteller, weaving suspense and intricate twists and turns into scripts that challenge the boundaries of contemporary crime thrillers and dramas.

Dedicated to a career in screenwriting and performance, Borcsa brings a distinctive, professional methodology to the artistic process. Her narratives are characterised by high-stakes tension and character-driven emotion, reflecting a profound understanding of the human psyche and the mechanics of the thriller genre.

With a background as a barrister and lawyer, her writing demonstrates that truth is often more interesting and stranger than fiction. Borcsa crafts immersive worlds that captivate both audience and industry professionals.
